title: Curaçao squad announcement | FIFA World Cup 2026
original_text:
Curaçao head coach Dick Advocaat has chosen his 26-man squad ahead of the tournament in Canada, Mexico and USA.
Curaçao have announced their 26-man squad for the FIFA World Cup 2026™.
The Blue Wave will be making their first appearance in the global finals and will be guided by Dutch tactician Dick Advocaat, who had stepped away from the job in February and was replaced by Fred Rutten, only to return to the post last week. Drawn into Group E, the Caribbean side will take on Côte d'Ivoire, Ecuador and Germany.
Advocaat's 26-man roster consists of many of the heroes from Curaçao's successful qualifying campaign. The sure-handed Eloy Room, who is one of the longest-serving players of the national team, headlines the goalkeepers list, while in defence the likes of Jurien Gaari and Roshon van Eijma give the Blue Wave a physical presence on the back line.
Advocaat has a wealth of talent in midfield, including the dynamic brotherly duo of Leandro and Juninho Bacuna, the latter scoring three goals in qualifying, while 22-year-old Livano Comenencia turned a lot of heads in the preliminaries with his late attacking runs into the area and clinical finishing.
— Curaçao National Football Team (@TheBlueWaveFFK) May 18, 2026
Opposing defenders in Group E will have their hands full with Curaçao's prolific and dangerous attacking force. Target forwards Jurgen Locadia and Jearl Margaritha have ample experience, while Gervane Kastaneer and Kenji Gorre combined for eight goals in qualifying. There is also Tahith Chong, who debuted with the Blue Wave in September 2025, and quickly showcased his game-changing ability.
Explore hospitality packages for Curaçao’s FIFA World Cup 2026™ matchesExplore hospitality packages for Curaçao’s FIFA World Cup 2026™ matches
GoalkeepersGoalkeepers
Tyrick Bodack Trevor Doornbusch Eloy Room
DefendersDefenders
Riechedly Bazoer Joshua Brenet Roshon van Eijma Sherel Floranus Deveron Fonville Jurien Gaari Armando Obispo Shurandy Sambo
MidfieldersMidfielders
Juninho Bacuna Leandro Bacuna Livano Comenencia Kevin Felida Ar'jany Martha Tyrese Noslin Godfried Roemeratoe
ForwardsForwards
Jeremy Antonisse Tahith Chong Kenji Gorre Sontje Hansen Gervane Kastaneer Brandley Kuwas Jurgen Locadia Jearl Margaritha
All squads are provisional until the final list of 26 players is announced by FIFA, following their submission by participating teams, on 2 June.
Curaçao’s World Cup 2026 fixtures Curaçao’s World Cup 2026 fixtures
14 June: Germany v Curaçao - Houston Stadium
20 June: Ecuador v Curaçao - Kansas City Stadium
25 June: Curaçao v Côte d'Ivoire - Philadelphia Stadium
